runTitle: v8.11.95 AI Ranking and Formatting Rewrite Recheck
coveredSurfaces: Vercel production /api/version returned 8.11.95, commit b4ea434c0d402f2542b9891e98c193fac96902a1, tag v8.11.95, pipeline 2497070918
Vercel production /api/health returned healthy with database/cache/ai connected
Cloud Run direct /health returned ai-engine version 8.11.95 with provider configs ready
Cloud Run revision ai-engine-00410-8j9 served 100% traffic with maxScale=1, cpu=1, memory=512Mi, concurrency=16
Fullscreen /dashboard/ai-assistant loaded on Vercel production with AI Engine Online and provider routing panel configured
Playwright MCP submitted CPU top-3 prompt through the visible AI Chat input
CPU top-3 response used /api/ai/supervisor/stream/v2, called getServerMetricsAdvanced, and returned data-done.success=true
CPU top-3 response rendered server IDs and values: db-mysql-dc1-primary CPU 43%, db-mysql-dc1-replica CPU 41%, api-was-dc1-01 CPU 38%
CPU top-3 response did not contain the previous false answer '서버는 없습니다' and did not degrade into value-only lines like 'cpu 85%'
Formatting-only rewrite prompt stayed on /api/ai/supervisor/stream/v2 and rendered as general chat response
Formatting-only rewrite did not call /api/ai/jobs and did not show Reporter pipeline, artifact, anomaly/trend, or job queue text
Playwright network requests under /api/ai were limited to wake-up and supervisor stream calls for this scenario
Vercel usage remained billed 0.0000 USD after QA
Cloud Run free-tier guardrail script passed all checks
skippedSurfaces: Reporter report generation tab execution was not clicked because this run targeted the regression where formatting-only rewrite must not invoke Reporter
Anomaly/trend artifact generation was not clicked because this run targeted avoiding artifact false-positive routing
Cloud Run admin /monitoring and Langfuse trace lookup were outside this targeted smoke
Dashboard sidebar/mobile layout and topology deep interactions were outside this targeted smoke

aiLatencyObservations.surface: Fullscreen AI Chat CPU top 3 deterministic recovery
aiLatencyObservations.source: Playwright MCP network data-done + visible response footer

expertAssessments.rationale: The exact production regression prompts were replayed through Playwright MCP and produced grounded ranking output plus clean success metadata.
The answer cited current synthetic OTel slot data and preserved tool evidence with getServerMetricsAdvanced dataSlot metadata.
GitLab tag pipeline succeeded, Vercel and Cloud Run version endpoints match v8.11.95, and Cloud Run free-tier guardrails remain intact.
The QA used browser rendering, visible input submission, network inspection, and durable screenshot evidence.
The response preserved ranked server IDs and CPU percentages from the tool result instead of relying on model-only formatting.

usageChecks.summary: Current billing period checked after v8.11.95 Playwright MCP QA; effective 1.3446 USD, billed remains 0.0000 USD, chargeCount 1218.
Free-tier guardrails intact: maxScale=1, concurrency=16, timeout=300, cpu=1, memory=512Mi, cpu-throttling=true.

artifacts.label: v8.11.95 AI ranking and formatting rewrite recheck

completedImprovements.title: Supervisor single stream returns deterministic advanced metric ranking with success metadata
completedImprovements.evidence: CPU top-3 prompt returned server IDs, values, data-done.success=true, and no STREAM_ERROR/SUPERVISOR_STREAM_FAILED text

completedImprovements.title: Formatting-only report rewrite stays on chat stream path
completedImprovements.evidence: Rewrite prompt used /api/ai/supervisor/stream/v2 and did not call jobs, Reporter pipeline, or artifact generation

notes: This run intentionally focused on the regression chain discovered during v8.11.93/v8.11.94 QA: advanced metric ranking answer grounding, success metadata, and formatting-only rewrite routing.
The visible rewrite answer was concise rather than exactly two sentences, but the targeted bug was route selection and false Reporter/artifact/job escalation; no escalation occurred.
No GitHub public snapshot sync was performed.
